problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
